variables.name: supplies
variables.description: Powder, oil, and arrows the defense is spent from. Drawn down by hard stands (heavy-assault gates and the command node) and made up +1 on each quiet night. Gates which stand is open at a supplies resolution and the best win (full magazine).

variables.name: morale
variables.description: The garrison's will to hold. Raised when the commander spends himself for the men (sharing the stand, walking the night watch); lowered by callous or panicked choices and by being spotted. Gates whether the line holds firm or wavers, and the whole/gutted finale reads.

variables.name: breach
variables.description: Whether the west wall has been broken (set true only when the sixth assault is held on an empty magazine, from within the gap). Changes the eighth assault (the tower makes for the gap) and the finale (whole vs breached). The best win requires it stay false.
